description_long: This is a corner lounge set featuring a light wood frame with integrated bench seating arranged in an L-shape, accompanied by a matching rectangular table and two small stools. The seating area is upholstered in a light, textured fabric, providing a soft and comfortable surface for users. The backrest curves smoothly around the corner, offering continuous support along the entire length of the bench. The table and stools share the same wood finish and have simple, sturdy designs with gently curved legs. The set is designed for communal seating, ideal for parks, outdoor cafes, or urban rest areas. The overall aesthetic is clean and modern, with a focus on functionality and comfort.
description: A light wood L-shaped corner lounge set with upholstered bench seating, a matching table, and two stools. The design is modern, comfortable, and suitable for communal urban spaces.
description_view_0: The back and side of the L-shaped bench are visible, showing the continuous upholstered backrest and the table with two stools tucked underneath.
description_view_1: The curved corner of the bench and the side profile of the table are prominent, highlighting the smooth transition of the backrest and the table's decorative legs.
description_view_2: A frontal view of the set reveals the full seating arrangement, the table's surface, and both stools positioned in front of the bench.
description_view_3: The rear of the lounge set is shown, emphasizing the solid wood back panels and the curvature of the bench.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Continuous, attached seat and back cushions along the L-shaped bench; no loose or individual cushions; corner section is smoothly integrated.
attribute_backrest_design: Curved, medium-height backrest with a seamless, upholstered surface; no segmentation or tufting; wraps around the corner for unified support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; the bench has open ends with no armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Short, thick, straight wooden legs for the bench; table and stools have gently curved, solid wood legs with a simple, sturdy profile.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, lightly textured fabric with a subtle woven appearance; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
